author: anon-13168fa2
content: Delivered: (a) Created 00-foundations/03-the-language-landscape.md covering systems/application/specialized language families, how to choose, why the guild uses Rust, all conceptual with zero syntax. (b) Renumbered workspace to 04, git to 05. Added Tool 4 (Rust toolchain) section to workspace chapter with install instructions for all platforms, cargo/rustc explanation, and verification step. (c) Rewrote issue tracker project in tracking chapter as Rust CLI: new design doc with CLI subcommands, new build layers using cargo, new learning outcomes covering Rust compilation, CLI design, and serialization. Added note about bookmark manager being the one HTML/JS exception. (d) Rewrote README with full 4-phase structure, Phase 3 placeholders, projects table showing progression, updated portfolio requirements to include workshop contributions.
